ANEA: Fixed asset line items recording proportional, partial-period values, one row per asset, fiscal year, and line number.
ANEK: Header data for asset posting documents, one row per company code, asset, fiscal year, and line number.
ANLP: Periodic values for fixed assets, such as planned depreciation, one row per company code, asset, and fiscal year period.
BP001: Financial Services industry-specific organizational attributes for a business partner, one row per partner.
BPID001: Additional identification numbers assigned to a business partner, one row per partner, ID type, and ID number.
BUT000_TD: Time-dependent shadow copy of general business partner master data, one row per partner and validity end date.
BUTADRSEARCH: Search-help data for locating business partners by address, one row per partner and address number.
CKMI1: Index linking accounting documents to a material's costing record, one row per costing number, fiscal year, and period.
CKMLCR: Material Ledger period totals for values, one row per costing number, fiscal year, period, and currency type.
CKMLCRWIP: Material Ledger period totals for work-in-process values, one row per costing number, fiscal year, period, and currency type.
CKMLKEPH: Material Ledger cost component split by element, one row per costing number, period, cost element, and currency type.
CKMLLACRWIP: Material Ledger activity type period records for work-in-process values, one row per costing number, period, and currency type.
CKMLLAPPWIP: Material Ledger activity type period records for work-in-process quantities, one row per costing number and period.
CKMLMV003: Material Ledger process model data for goods receipts and mixing strategies, one row per movement group, fiscal year, and period.
CKMLMV004: Material Ledger process model data for material withdrawals, one row per plant, movement group, fiscal year, and period.
CKMLMV004WIP: Material Ledger process model data for work-in-process deductions, one row per plant, movement group, and fiscal year.
CKMLMV011: List of costing objects included in a Material Ledger costing run, one row per run ID and costing number.
CKMLPP: Material Ledger period totals for quantities, one row per costing number, fiscal year, and period.
CKMLPPWIP: Material Ledger period records for work-in-process quantities, one row per costing number, fiscal year, and period.
CKMLPRKEKO: Header data for a Material Ledger cost component split, one row per costing number, period, and price type.
CKMLPRKEPH: Material Ledger cost component split elements, one row per costing number, period, cost element, and price type.
DBTABLOG: Log entries recording changes made to database tables, one row per log date, time, and log ID.
DBVM: MRP planning file entries flagging materials that need requirements planning, one row per MRP area and material.
DD06L: ABAP Dictionary metadata describing pool and cluster table structures, one row per SQL table name and version.
DD06T: Language-dependent text descriptions of SQL tables from the ABAP Dictionary, one row per table, language, and version.
DD16S: ABAP Dictionary metadata for SQL table fields, one row per table, field name, and version.
DOKTL: Text lines making up SAP documentation content, one row per document, object, language, type, version, and line.
EBEW: Valuation data for stock tied to a sales order, one row per material, valuation area, sales order, and item.
EBEWH: Historical valuation data for sales-order stock, one row per material, sales order, item, fiscal year, and period.
FAGLBSAS: Secondary index of cleared general ledger account line items, one row per company code, account, and clearing document.
FAGLBSIS: Secondary index of general ledger account line items, one row per company code, account, and document number.
FMAVCT: Availability control summary data for Funds Management's Budget Control System, one row per fiscal year, object, and currency.
FMBDT: Budget totals for Funds Management, one row per fiscal year, budget object, and currency.
FMGLFLEXA: Actual general ledger line items, one row per fiscal year, document number, ledger, company code, and line item.
FMGLFLEXT: Totals for public-sector general ledger accounts, one row per fiscal year and set of account assignment objects.
GLPCP: Planned line items for Profit Center Accounting, one row per client and condition/summary record ID.
GLPCT: Totals table for Profit Center Accounting, one row per ledger, fiscal year, and account assignment object.
JVGLFLEXA: General ledger actual line items for Joint Venture Accounting, one row per fiscal year, document number, ledger, and line item.
JVGLFLEXT: General ledger totals for Joint Venture Accounting, one row per fiscal year and account assignment object.
J_1IMOCUST: India-specific excise duty data attached to a customer master record, one row per customer.
J_1IMOVEND: India-specific excise duty data attached to a vendor master record, one row per vendor.
J_3GPRLHD: Header data for CEM price list condition records, one row per client and condition record number.
KOND3: Condition record data used for campaign determination in pricing, one row per client and condition record number.
KONDN: Condition record data for free-goods pricing determination, one row per client and condition record number.
KONH: Header data for pricing condition records, one row per client and condition record number.
KONHM: Condition record data used for portfolio determination in pricing, one row per client and condition record number.
MARCH: Historical plant-level material master data, one row per material, plant, fiscal year, and period.
MARCHO1: Additional quantity data appended to the MARCH history table, one row per material, plant, fiscal year, period, and unit of measure.
MARCO1: Additional quantity data at plant level for a material, one row per material, plant, and unit of measure.
MARDH: Historical storage-location-level material master data, one row per material, plant, storage location, fiscal year, and period.
MARDHO1: Additional quantity data appended to the MARDH history table, one row per material, plant, storage location, fiscal year, period, and unit of measure.
MARDO1: Additional quantity data at storage location level for a material, one row per material, plant, storage location, and unit of measure.
MATERIALID: Mapping of internal material ID numbers to material master records, one row per internal material ID.
MBEWH: Historical material valuation data, one row per material, valuation area, valuation type, fiscal year, and period.
MCHBH: Historical batch stock quantities, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, fiscal year, and period.
MCHBO1: Additional quantity data at batch level for a material, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, and unit of measure.
MCSD: Stock of a material held for or by a customer, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, and customer.
MCSDH: Historical customer stock quantities, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, customer, fiscal year, and period.
MCSS: Total customer stock quantities summarized at plant level, one row per material, plant, and customer.
MCSSH: Historical totals of customer-supplied stock, one row per material, plant, customer, fiscal year, and period.
MDKP: Header data for an MRP planning document, one row per document type, material, planning plant, and planning scenario.
MDTB: Line items of an MRP planning document, one row per document number and item position.
MDVM: Entries in the MRP planning file flagging materials that need requirements planning, one row per planning file ID and key.
MKOL: Special stock of a material held at or by a vendor, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, and vendor.
MKOLH: Historical special stock quantities held at or by a vendor, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, vendor, fiscal year, and period.
MKOLHO1: Additional quantity data appended to the MKOLH history table, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, vendor, fiscal year, and unit of measure.
MKOLO1: Additional quantity data for vendor special stock, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, vendor, and unit of measure.
MLCD: Material Ledger summarization records derived from postings, one row per costing number, period, category, and currency type.
MLCR: Currency and value data for a Material Ledger document, one row per document number, fiscal year, item, and currency type.
MLCRF: Field-group breakdown of currency amounts for a Material Ledger document, one row per document, period, currency type, and field group.
MLCRP: Price-change currency and price data for a Material Ledger document, one row per document, fiscal year, item, period, and currency type.
MLKEPH: Cost component split by element for a Material Ledger document, one row per document, period, cost element, and currency type.
MLMST: Header data for a Material Ledger costing document, one row per document number and fiscal year.
MLPP: Posting period and quantity data for a Material Ledger document, one row per document, fiscal year, item, and period.
MLPPF: Field-group breakdown of posting period data for a Material Ledger document, one row per document, period, and field group.
MLPRKEKO: Header data for the cost component split of a Material Ledger document, one row per document, period, and price type.
MLPRKEPH: Cost component split by component for a Material Ledger document, one row per document, period, cost element, and price type.
MSCD: Customer stock held at a vendor's location, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, and customer.
MSCDH: Historical quantities of customer stock held at a vendor's location, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, customer, fiscal year, and period.
MSCS: Total customer stock held at a vendor's location, summarized at plant level, one row per material, plant, vendor, and customer.
MSEGO1: Quantity conversion parameters for a material document, one row per material document, fiscal year, and line item.
MSEGO2: Material document quantities expressed in an additional unit of measure, one row per material document, line item, and unit.
MSFD: Sales-order stock held at a vendor's location, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, sales order, and item.
MSFDH: Historical sales-order stock quantities held at a vendor's location, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, sales order, item, fiscal year, and period.
MSFS: Total sales-order stock held at a vendor's location, summarized at plant level, one row per material, plant, vendor, sales order, and item.
MSID: Stock owned by a vendor and held at another vendor's location, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, and owner.
MSIDH: Historical quantities of vendor-owned stock held at another vendor's location, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, owner, fiscal year, and period.
MSIS: Total vendor-owned stock held at another vendor's location, summarized at plant level, one row per material, plant, vendor, and owner.
MSKA: Stock of a material reserved for a specific sales order, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, sales order, and item.
MSKAH: Historical quantities of sales-order stock, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, sales order, item, fiscal year, and period.
MSKAHO1: Additional quantity data appended to the MSKAH history table, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, sales order, item, fiscal year, and unit of measure.
MSKAO1: Additional quantity data for sales-order special stock, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, sales order, item, and unit of measure.
MSKU: Special stock of a material held for a customer, one row per material, plant, batch, and customer.
MSKUH: Historical quantities of special stock held for a customer, one row per material, plant, batch, customer, fiscal year, and period.
MSKUHO1: Additional quantity data appended to the MSKUH history table, one row per material, plant, batch, customer, fiscal year, period, and unit of measure.
MSKUO1: Additional quantity data for special stock held for a customer, one row per material, plant, batch, customer, and unit of measure.
MSLB: Special stock of a material held at a vendor, such as consignment stock, one row per material, plant, batch, and vendor.
MSLBH: Historical quantities of special stock held at a vendor, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, fiscal year, and period.
MSLBHO1: Additional quantity data appended to the MSLB history table, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, fiscal year, period, and unit of measure.
MSLBO1: Additional quantity data for special stock held at a vendor, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, and unit of measure.
MSPR: Stock of a material assigned to a project WBS element, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, and WBS element.
MSPRH: Historical quantities of project stock, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, WBS element, fiscal year, and period.
MSPRHO1: Additional quantity data appended to the MSPRH history table, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, WBS element, fiscal year, and unit of measure.
MSPRO1: Additional quantity data for project stock, one row per material, plant, storage location, batch, WBS element, and unit of measure.
MSRD: Project stock held at a vendor's location, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, and WBS element.
MSRDH: Historical quantities of project stock held at a vendor's location, one row per material, plant, batch, vendor, WBS element, fiscal year, and period.
MSRS: Total project stock held at a vendor's location, summarized at plant level, one row per material, plant, vendor, and WBS element.
MSSA: Total sales-order stock summarized at plant level, one row per material, plant, sales order, and item.
MSSAH: Historical totals of sales-order stock, one row per material, plant, sales order, item, fiscal year, and period.
MSSL: Total special stock held at a vendor, summarized at plant level, one row per material, plant, and vendor.
MSSQ: Total project stock summarized at plant level, one row per material, plant, and WBS element.
MSSQH: Historical totals of project stock, one row per material, plant, WBS element, fiscal year, and period.
MSTBH: Historical quantities of stock in transit, one row per material, plant, batch, valuation type, fiscal year, and period.
MSTEH: Historical quantities of stock in transit tied to a sales and distribution document, one row per material, plant, sales document, item, fiscal year, and period.
MSTQ: Stock in transit for a project, one row per material, plant, batch, WBS element, and valuation type.
MSTQH: Historical quantities of stock in transit for a project, one row per material, plant, batch, WBS element, valuation type, fiscal year, and period.
NACH: Detailed data for an output record, one row per client and record number.
OBEW: Valuated stock held at a subcontractor, one row per material, valuation area, valuation type, and vendor.
OBEWH: Historical valuation of stock held at a subcontractor, one row per material, valuation area, valuation type, vendor, fiscal year, and period.
QBEW: Valuation data for stock assigned to a project, one row per material, valuation area, valuation type, and WBS element.
QBEWH: Historical valuation data for project stock, one row per material, valuation area, valuation type, WBS element, fiscal year, and period.
RQHD: Header record for a total-requirements record in MRP, one row per requirement number.
RQIT: Item-level detail for a total-requirements record in MRP, one row per requirement number, record type, and item.
S066: Open sales order values used for credit management checks, one row per credit control area, customer, and period.
S067: Open delivery and billing document values used for credit management checks, one row per credit control area, customer, and period.
STXL: Lines of SAPscript long-text content, one row per text object, name, ID, language, and line.
T169P: Configuration parameters for Invoice Verification, one row per company code.
T605U: Foreign trade rules converting export and import business transaction types between countries, one row per country pair and transaction type.
T605Z: Foreign trade default proposals for the business transaction type in export, one row per country, sales organization, distribution channel, and item category.
T616U: Foreign trade rules converting import and export procedures between countries, one row per country pair and procedure.
T616Z: Foreign trade default proposals for the procedure used in export, one row per country, sales organization, distribution channel, division, and item category.
T881: Master data defining a general ledger, one row per ledger.
T882G: Assignment of company codes to general ledgers, one row per company code and ledger.
TABWA: Mapping of asset transaction types to depreciation areas, one row per chart of depreciation, transaction type, and depreciation area.
TABWV: Default asset transaction types assigned to a business transaction, one row per business transaction.
USER_ADDR: Address and contact details for system users, such as name, phone extension, department, and room, one row per user.
VAKPA: Sales document index of orders organized by partner function, one row per customer, partner function, and sales order.
VAPMA: Sales document index of order items organized by material, one row per material, sales order, and item.
VBOX: Index linking billing documents to rebate condition records, one row per condition table, condition key, billing document, and item.
VLKPA: Sales and distribution index of deliveries organized by partner function, one row per customer, partner function, and delivery.
VLPMA: Sales and distribution index of delivery items organized by material, one row per material, delivery, and item.
WIND: Index of condition records used for automatic document adjustment (mass pricing updates), one row per document type, condition record, and item.
